2152950.name: Beyond the Gate
2152950.description:
Beyond the Gate is an experimental ARPG infused with ideas from games I admire: Torchlight, No Man's Sky, GemCraft, and others.

Features:

  • Atmosphere of colorful desolation: A paradise for those who enjoy minimalist aesthetics and strangeness.
  • Procedurally generated content: Areas, equipment, enemies, and even consumables are procedurally generated.
  • Magi duels: The game has real-time projectile-based combat with attack charging and overloading for maximum risk 'n reward.
  • Community exploration: Share seeds of the best worlds with the community. Let's see if we can find the best of what's beyond the Gate!
  • Lite but sweet: Designed to be fun for a few hours. But if grinding is your thing, the game can be played for m̷̱̓û̶͕c̴̡͆h̷̭͝ ̶̭̉ĺ̵ͅo̷̜͋n̶̮͛g̷̞̈e̷͆͜r̸̹͐.
2152950.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
